summary: Summary: Speaker2 began neutral after a long wait and asked to have his license processed; Speaker1 responded neutral while explaining the office’s two-form ID requirement. When told he needed to go home for another form after waiting three hours, Speaker2 reacted with surprise, then escalating frustration and anger, arguing and seeking ways to circumvent the rule. Speaker1 remained neutral, repeatedly enforced the policy, and showed moments of frustration while suggesting Speaker2 return with proper documentation. The conversation followed this trajectory and ended unresolved, with Speaker2 in frustration and anger and Speaker1 maintaining a neutral stance with occasional frustration.
